privileged_info_summary: The task creates a split-screen layout named 'Gate Monitor' in Nx Witness VMS. The layout displays the 'Parking Lot Camera' (the first virtual test camera created during environment setup) twice: once as a full wide-angle view and once with digital zoom applied (2x-4x magnification). Nx Witness is a real video management system from Network Optix using the standard HTTPS API on localhost port 7001. The task involves interacting with both the desktop client UI and REST API endpoints at /rest/v1/layouts and /rest/v1/devices. The camera data is synthetic (created via the testcamera tool), but the VMS software and API are real production systems.
